violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed eating while preparing food and outside of designated area. Observed open Monster in the cooler with food items during the inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed numerous food items in coolers not date marked at time of inspection.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed lined pans with grocery bags and piping bags of avocados, etc in cooler.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
